name: Polynomial roots via Durand-Kerner
task: Create /tmp/eval_dk/dk.py with find_roots(coeffs, max_iter=2000, tol=1e-12) finding all complex roots of a polynomial whose coefficients are given low-to-high (coeffs[0] = constant, coeffs[-1] = leading). Use the Durand-Kerner iteration with seed (0.4 + 0.9j)^k. Return a list of complex numbers.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_dk/dk.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); F = mod.find_roots; r = F([6,-5,1]); rs = sorted(x.real for x in r); assert abs(rs[0]-2) < 1e-6 and abs(rs[1]-3) < 1e-6; r = F([-6,11,-6,1]); rs = sorted(x.real for x in r); assert abs(rs[0]-1) < 1e-5 and abs(rs[1]-2) < 1e-5 and abs(rs[2]-3) < 1e-5; print('OK')
